# CLKComplicationPrivacyBehavior.showOnLockScreen

**Case**

Show the complication data when the Apple Watch is locked.

## Declaration

```swift
case showOnLockScreen
```

## Constants

- **CLKComplicationPrivacyBehavior.hideOnLockScreen**: Don’t show the complication data when the Apple Watch is locked.
